ddls:
CREATE TABLE "anime_series" (
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime series */,
  "english_name" TEXT /* English name of the anime series */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Number of completions by users */,
  "on_hold" INTEGER /* Number of users who have placed the series on hold */,
  "dropped" INTEGER /* Number of users who have dropped the series */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of times the series has been favorited by users */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on user engagement */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall score of the series based on ratings */,
  "rating_tot" REAL /* Total number of ratings received by the series */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the anime series release */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date of the anime series end (if completed) */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the studio that produced the anime */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the anime series */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the anime series (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description or synopsis of the anime series */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the anime series */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the trailer of the anime series */,
  "is_ongoing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the series is ongoing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_series_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform (e.g., admin, analyst, content manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user (1 to 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the anime */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series marked as favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the anime was favorited */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the favorite is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series for which metrics are recorded */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the anime series */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on social media platforms */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments made by users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metrics were last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on social media platforms */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on social media platforms */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions on social media platforms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Romance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime_genres" (
  "anime_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime-genre association */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the anime series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_genres_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an admin */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., content manager, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the admin account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the admin's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the admin account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (JSON format or text) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., popularity, engagement, demographics) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the studio is based */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the studio's official website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the studio entry was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the studio is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription ends */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subscription is recurring */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subscription was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* JSON object describing the features included in the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the plan was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the plan is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)
